parameters.jsCode:
return items.filter(item => {
  const position = (item.json.position || "").toLowerCase();
  const tags = (item.json.tags || []).join(" ").toLowerCase();

  const text = position + " " + tags;

  // STRICTLY ALLOWED TECH DOMAINS
  const allowedKeywords = [
    "python",
    "backend",
    "software engineer",
    "software developer",
    "cybersecurity",
    "security engineer",
    "soc",
    "siem",
    "devsecops",
    "cloud",
    "api",
    "flask",
    "linux",
    "network",
    "automation",
    "pentest",
    "threat",
    "detection",
    "developer",
    "engineer",
    "analyst",
    "java",
    "c++",
    "javascript",
    "full stack",
    "fullstack",
    "web security",
    "application security"
  ];

  const matchesAllowed = allowedKeywords.some(keyword =>
    text.includes(keyword)
  );

  if (!matchesAllowed) return false;

  // BLOCK SENIOR/UNREALISTIC JOBS
  const blockedSeniorKeywords = [
    "senior",
    "lead",
    "principal",
    "architect",
    "manager",
    "director",
    "head",
    "staff",
    "expert"
  ];

  const isSenior = blockedSeniorKeywords.some(keyword =>
    text.includes(keyword)
  );

  if (isSenior) return false;

  // BLOCK NON-TECH JOBS
  const blockedNonTechKeywords = [
    "sales",
    "marketing",
    "therapist",
    "mental health",
    "healthcare",
    "doctor",
    "nurse",
    "designer",
    "ui",
    "ux",
    "hr",
    "recruiter",
    "customer support",
    "business development",
    "seo",
    "content writer",
    "accountant",
    "finance",
    "lawyer",
    "legal"
  ];

  const isNonTech = blockedNonTechKeywords.some(keyword =>
    text.includes(keyword)
  );

  if (isNonTech) return false;

  return true;
});

return items.map(item => {

  const job = item.json;

  return {
    json: {

      id:
        job.id ||
        "",

      position:
        job.position ||
        job.title ||
        job.jobTitle ||
        job.role ||
        "Unknown Position",

      company:
        job.company ||
        job.company_name ||
        job.employer ||
        "Unknown Company",

      url:
        job.url ||
        job.apply_url ||
        job.link ||
        job.applyLink ||
        "No link available",

      tags:
        Array.isArray(job.tags)
          ? job.tags
          : [],

      description:
        job.description ||
        job.desc ||
        job.job_description ||
        "",

      source:
        job.source ||
        "unknown"
    }
  };
});
